baseline_binding.interpretation: The accepted STRM-000 chunk-shape case remains historical specification-only evidence; this overlay records only independently authored local Rust composition of previously validated timestamped chunks, descriptors, and descriptor/sample bindings.

does_not_prove: clock reading, clock correction, dejittering, smoothing, interpolation, or timestamp derivation
timestamp sorting, rewriting, scheduling, buffering, queueing, or postprocessing
chunk splitting, merging, rechunking, recovery, or runtime lifecycle
numeric or string conversion, coercion, casting, parsing, formatting, or normalization
byte sizing, encoding, decoding, endianness, memory layout, or wire mapping
XML, discovery, networking, transport, protocol, providers, or runtime action
source identity, authorization, admission, routing, permission, or Morphospace authority
